parsed.production_notes: The video is a traditional 2D motion graphics animation. It features vector-based illustrations, smooth keyframed animations, and standard app screencast elements, with no signs of AI generation.

characters.appearance: A stylized, bright green cartoon owl with large, expressive eyes and a simple, rounded vector-art body. It has a small orange beak and no visible clothing.

panels.panel_visual_description: The scene begins with a completely solid, light blue background filling the entire frame. There are no textures, gradients, or other visual elements present initially. After a few moments, the background abruptly changes to a solid, vibrant green color. In the center of this green background, a stylized cartoon owl face appears. The owl is bright green with large, wide-open eyes that have black pupils and white sclera. It features a small, curved orange beak positioned between the eyes. The owl's expression is friendly and attentive, looking directly forward.

scenes.visual_description: The video opens with a solid light blue background. Bold, white text appears word-by-word in the center of the screen, reading 'For anyone who doesn't speak another language'. The background then cuts to a bright green color. The Duolingo owl mascot's face appears in the center. Below the owl, white text reads 'you've gotta try duolingo'. The text animation is snappy and syncs with the voiceover.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: For anyone who doesn't speak another language, you've gotta try Duolingo.
scenes.on_screen_text:
For anyone who doesn't speak another language
you've gotta try duolingo

panels.panel_visual_description: A stark white background fills the screen. Two horizontal rows of rectangular flags are displayed, stretching across the width of the frame. The flags feature various colorful geometric patterns, stripes, and symbols, representing different nations. These rows of flags are in constant motion, sliding smoothly from the right side of the screen towards the left. The top row of flags moves at a slightly faster pace than the bottom row, creating a subtle parallax effect. The flags are evenly spaced within their respective rows. The overall composition is clean, flat, and graphic.

scenes.visual_description: The scene features a white background with two horizontal rows of national flags scrolling from right to left. The flags include those of Brazil, Spain, Denmark, Germany, France, and the USA, among others. In the center of the screen, between the two rows of flags, bright green text is displayed. The text reads 'more than half the world's population'. The text remains static in the center while the flags continue to scroll behind it. The visual style is flat and minimalist.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: Did you know more than half the world's population speaks more than one language?
scenes.on_screen_text: more than half the world's population

scenes.setting: Abstract white space with floating elements

panels.panel_visual_description: A blank, glowing rectangular slab, resembling the shape of a smartphone, floats dynamically in the center of a white void. A bright green cartoon owl and several diverse, stylized cartoon people tumble and float playfully around the slab in a zero-gravity manner. The characters include a woman with purple hair, a man with a mustache, and a girl in a pink tracksuit. The rectangular slab then shifts to a vertical, straight-on position, filling more of the frame. The surface of the slab displays various colorful, abstract shapes and icons that change rapidly. These changing graphics include a stylized flame icon, a grid resembling a calendar, and a list of horizontal bars. The background remains a solid white throughout these transformations.

scenes.visual_description: A 3D representation of a smartphone appears, surrounded by various animated Duolingo characters floating around it. The phone screen then displays a series of app interface screencasts. These screencasts show a translation exercise with a character, a 7-day streak calendar with a flame icon, a matching game with images of coffee and water, and a language selection menu. As the phone displays these features, large green text words pop up around the device, syncing with the voiceover. The pop-up words include 'the code', 'making', 'than ever', 'another language', 'uses', 'research-backed', 'to create', 'for over 40', and 'languages!'. The scene ends with a character cheering on the phone screen and the text 'You can learn for free!'.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: Duolingo has cracked the code, making it easier than ever to learn another language.
Unknown speaker says: Duolingo uses research-backed teaching methods to create fun lessons for over 40 different languages.
Unknown speaker says: Plus, you can learn for free!
scenes.on_screen_text:
the code
making
than ever
another language
uses
research-backed
to create
for over 40
languages!
You can learn for free!

panels.panel_visual_description: A bright green cartoon owl stands in the center of a stark white background. The owl has a simple, rounded vector-art body, large eyes, and a small orange beak. It is actively animated, happily swaying and dancing from side to side. As the owl moves, its small wings flap gently. Small, light blue musical notes float upwards from the owl, suggesting it is listening to or making music. The owl maintains a cheerful, energetic expression throughout its dance. The surrounding space remains completely empty and white.

scenes.visual_description: The Duolingo owl mascot is shown dancing at the bottom center of the screen on a white background. Above the dancing owl, the Duolingo logo is prominently displayed in green. Below the logo, a bright green rectangular button contains the white text 'LEARN A LANGUAGE FOR FREE'. Underneath this button, there are two black badges for app stores: 'Download on the App Store' and 'GET IT ON Google Play'. Small blue musical notes animate around the dancing owl. The layout resembles a standard promotional end-card.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: What are you waiting for? Download Duolingo today and start your journey to learn another language.
[music only, no speech]
scenes.on_screen_text:
duolingo
LEARN A LANGUAGE FOR FREE
Download on the App Store
GET IT ON Google Play
